title: Atomic cross-worktree hold acquisition under one shared lock; heartbeat TTL renewal
action: skills/bee-hive/templates/bee.mjs handleReservationsReserve: today findForeignHolds (unlocked read) -> local reserve (local lock) -> mirrorHold (shared lock, append-only) is check-then-act. Restructure: acquire the main-root cross-worktree-holds lock FIRST (worktree-holds exports its lock name/root helpers; add an acquire/withLock export if needed), and inside it: re-check foreign holds, perform the local reserve, append the mirror hold — one atomic critical section (lock order: shared outermost, local store lock inside). skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/worktree-holds.mjs: (1) correct the stale UNWIRED header (module IS wired since xwh-2); (2) add renewHolds(mainRoot, sessionId) that refreshes mirrored_at for that session live holds under the shared lock; (3) export what bee.mjs needs for the atomic section. Wire renewHolds into the existing heartbeat renewal path (the hook that renews claim leases — find it in the hooks/ source dir, mirrored at .bee/bin/hooks/; keep its try-once lock posture: a missed renewal is skipped, never blocks). scripts/test_worktree_holds_race.mjs: add a same-path race — N concurrent reserve flows through the atomic section on the SAME path must yield exactly one winner; and a renewal test — renewHolds pushes mirrored_at forward so isExpired stays false past the original TTL.

truths: Two concurrent reserves of the same path across worktrees yield exactly one active hold
renewHolds extends a live hold past its original 1h expiry
prohibitions: Do not hold the shared lock across any child-process spawn
Keep mirrorHold append-only semantics for audit (renewal may rewrite mirrored_at in place)

trace.outcome: Restructured handleReservationsReserve's check-then-act (unlocked findForeignHolds -> reserve -> mirrorHold) into one atomic section under worktree-holds.mjs's new withHoldsLock; added renewHolds(mainRoot,sessionId) wired into the heartbeat hook (hooks/bee-state-sync.mjs), and same-path race + renewal regression tests.

deviations.description: Cell text listed the heartbeat/lease-renewal hook file as hooks/bee-heartbeat.mjs, which does not exist in this repo. The actual claim/hold lease-renewal hook is hooks/bee-state-sync.mjs (PostToolUse/SubagentStop/Stop) — it already renews claims.mjs heartbeatTouch and reservations.mjs renewHoldsBySession on the same touch. renewHolds was wired into THIS real file (and its .bee/bin/hooks mirror) instead of a nonexistent bee-heartbeat.mjs.

PASS  reserve from an ordinary checkout mirrors into the shared ledger under holder "main"
PASS  reservations list --json surfaces the mirrored entry under cross_worktree
PASS  a repo that never reserves anything has no cross-worktree ledger file (byte-identical to today)
PASS  reserve against a path a DIFFERENT checkout holds is refused as a typed FOREIGN_HOLD naming holder + expiry
PASS  a reserve on a NON-overlapping path is unaffected by an unrelated foreign hold
PASS  release clears this checkout's mirrored ledger entries
PASS  release --agent (no --cell) only clears THAT agent's own mirrored cell(s) — never a different agent/cell sharing the same holder (regression: caught live, a same-checkout agent-wide release once wiped out a concurrent agent's active mirrored holds too, because a ledger row has no agent field, only holder+cell)
PASS  sweep prunes TTL-expired ledger entries
PASS  worktree merge --cleanup releases every mirrored hold for the removed worktree's id
PASS  reserve from an UNGRANTED linked worktree lands in the shared main reservations store but never mirrors into the ledger
